---
title: Core Workflow Contracts
scope: .agents/workflows/
---

# Core Workflows — Behavioral Contracts

## Handshake Workflow

### Documentation Sync
```
Feature: Session Finalization
  Scenario: Handshake updates core project documentation
    Given the handshake workflow is commanded
    When the workflow executes
    Then tasks.qmd is updated with completed items
    And wireframe.qmd is updated with structural changes
    And walkthrough.qmd is updated with the session delta
    And dev_journal.qmd and memory.qmd are updated with session context
```

### Security Sweep
```
Feature: Ghost Sweep
  Scenario: Handshake ensures no secrets are committed
    Given a session with code changes
    When the Ghost Sweep step executes
    Then the staged diff is scanned for API keys, tokens, and URLs
    And a warning is issued if potential breaches are found
```

## Lets-Go Workflow

### Context Ingestion
```
Feature: Session Resumption
  Scenario: Lets-Go builds a mental model of the current priority
    Given the lets-go workflow is commanded
    When the workflow executes
    Then tasks.qmd is read for the current priority
    And memory.qmd is read for architectural context
    And wireframe.qmd is read for UI components
```

### Strategic Proposal
```
Feature: Actionable Planning
  Scenario: Agent provides multiple paths for implementation
    Given context ingestion is complete
    When the workflow generates proposals
    Then 3 distinct proposals are presented with trade-offs
    And the output is persona-filtered (ODIN or ALFRED)
```

### Transition to Action
```
Feature: Workflow Chain
  Scenario: User selects a proposal to begin investigation
    Given 3 proposals have been presented
    When the user selects a path
    Then the investigate workflow is triggered for that path
    And tasks.qmd is updated with a detailed implementation breakdown
```

## Investigate Workflow

### Target Acquisition
```
Feature: Deep Analysis Initiation
  Scenario: Investigation begins with intent discovery
    Given the investigate workflow is commanded for a target
    When the workflow executes
    Then get_file_intent is called to retrieve intent and protocol
    And get_semantic_symbols is called to map the logic
```

### Raven Synchronization
```
Feature: Autonomous Repair Alignment
  Scenario: Investigation waits for autonomous background work
    Given an autonomous repair was triggered during investigation
    When the findings report is being finalized
    Then the system must wait for the "Muninn is done flying" status
    And the final Gungnir Matrix scores must be updated
```

## Plan Workflow

### The Recursive Loop
```
Feature: Strategic Definition
  Scenario: Plan enters a definition loop to resolve ambiguity
    Given the plan workflow is commanded
    When the agent identifies gaps in the request
    Then a recursive loop is entered
    And the system identifies relevant code sectors via pennyone search
    And clarifying questions are presented to the user
```

### Contract-First Defense
```
Feature: Architectural Blueprinting
  Scenario: New features require behavioral contracts
    Given the plan scope is locked
    When a new feature or major refactor is planned
    Then a Gherkin Contract (.qmd) must be created in tests/contracts/
    And the implementation plan must reference the contract
```
